news_items.headline: NVDA sank 4% on Friday amid rising bond yields and inflation worries despite approval for chip sales to China

Samsung Electronics issued public apology over labor union disputes; stock declined 8.61%
Samsung Electronics on track to match SK Hynix HBM market share by 2027
Broadcom price targets raised to $545 by Wells Fargo and $500 by TD Cowen; AI revenue running 30-40% higher than anticipated
Broadcom retreated from record highs due to China export restrictions and geopolitical risks impacting semiconductor sector
